integration_validation_v2.evidence: source_evidence.rs:233-276 anchor rows + validate_matrix:962 rejects VERIFIED anchors with empty verified_product_paths and BLOCKED without reason; tests/atelier_source_evidence_tests.rs:121 asserts MT-018 anchor VERIFIED+round-trips, :565 negative tests reject candidate/empty-verified/missing-reason. Non-blocking: 'VERIFIED' only proves cited file exists (assert_source_tree_ref_exists), not that the module implements the claimed Core/Data behavior

integration_validation_v3.evidence: V2 concern (VERIFIED = file-exists only) closed by new V3 test tests/atelier_source_evidence_tests.rs:634-767 mt002_core_data_verified_anchor_migrations_are_applied_in_live_postgres (57449ac7): records core-data matrix to live managed PG, re-reads, asserts every cited *.sql ref applied in _sqlx_migrations (success=TRUE), representative anchor migrations shape the live schema (information_schema checks), EventLedger SOURCE_EVIDENCE_MATRIX_RECORDED with blocked_missing_anchor_count=0.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs
